${modID}:ExampleCard.NAME: Name
${modID}:ExampleCard.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: This will automatically be used if the card is upgraded. Remove it if unneeded.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: You can put more text in here.
If you need to use it for stuff.
Blizzard is a good example for this.

${modID}:DarkEmbrace.NAME: Dark Embrace
${modID}:DarkEmbrace.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you exhaust a card, NL draw a card.

${modID}:FiendFire.NAME: Fiend Fire
${modID}:FiendFire.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust your hand, deal !D! damage for each card exhausted this way.

${modID}:SappingSlashes.NAME: Sapping Slashes
${modID}:SappingSlashes.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage !M! times, sap on every instance. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:SappingFire.NAME: Sapping Fire
${modID}:SappingFire.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust your hand, deal !D! damage for each card exhausted this way, sap on every instance.

${modID}:BlockingFire.NAME: Blocking Fire
${modID}:BlockingFire.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust your hand, gain !B! block for each card exhausted this way, deal damage equal to your block.

${modID}:BodySlam.NAME: Body Slam
${modID}:BodySlam.DESCRIPTION: Deal damage equal to your block.

${modID}:Havoc.NAME: Havoc
${modID}:Havoc.DESCRIPTION: Play the top card of your deck and exhaust it.

${modID}:TrueGrit.NAME: True Grit
${modID}:TrueGrit.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust a random card in your hand. NL Gain !B! block.
${modID}:TrueGrit.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Exhaust a card in your hand. NL Gain !B! block.

${modID}:FlameBarrier.NAME: Flame Barrier
${modID}:FlameBarrier.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! block. NL Whenever you are attacked this turn deal !M! damage back

${modID}:FeelNoPain.NAME: Feel No Pain
${modID}:FeelNoPain.DESCRIPTION: Whenever a card is exhausted, gain !M! block.

${modID}:PowerThrough.NAME: Power Through
${modID}:PowerThrough.DESCRIPTION: Add 2 wounds into your hand. NL Gain !B! block.

${modID}:Barricade.NAME: Barricade
${modID}:Barricade.DESCRIPTION: Block is not removed at the start of your turn.

${modID}:CompletedOffering.NAME: Complete Offering
${modID}:CompletedOffering.DESCRIPTION: Lose 6 HP. NL Gain [E] [E]. NL Draw !M! cards. Exhaust.

${modID}:Corruption.NAME: Corruption
${modID}:Corruption.DESCRIPTION: Skills cost 0. NL Whenever you play a Skill, Exhaust it.

${modID}:Exhume.NAME: Exhume
${modID}:Exhume.DESCRIPTION: Put a card from your exhaust pile into your hand. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Rampage.NAME: Rampage
${modID}:Rampage.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Increase this card's damage by !M! this combat.

${modID}:Sentinel.NAME: Sentinel
${modID}:Sentinel.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! block. NL If this card is exhausted gain  [E] [E] .
${modID}:Sentinel.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! block. NL If this card is exhausted gain  [E] [E] [E].

${modID}:BloodForBlood.NAME: Blood For Blood
${modID}:BloodForBlood.DESCRIPTION: Costs 1 less [E] for each time you lose HP this combat. NL Deal !D! damage.

${modID}:Brutality.NAME: Brutality
${modID}:Brutality.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn lose 1 HP and draw 1 card.
${modID}:Brutality.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Innate. NL At the start of your turn lose 1 HP and draw 1 card.

${modID}:Combust.NAME: Combust
${modID}:Combust.DESCRIPTION: At the end of your turn lose 1 HP and deal !M! damage to ALL enemies.

${modID}:DualWield.NAME: Dual Wield
${modID}:DualWield.DESCRIPTION: Choose an Attack or Power card. Add a copy of that card to your hand.
${modID}:DualWield.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Choose an Attack or Power card. Add 2 copies of that card to your hand.

${modID}:Headbutt.NAME: Headbutt
${modID}:Headbutt.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Put a card from your discard pile on top of your draw pile.

${modID}:Multitap.NAME: Multitap
${modID}:Multitap.DESCRIPTION: Your next attack this turn is played twice.
${modID}:Multitap.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Your next attack this turn is played thrice.

${modID}:Rupture.NAME: Rupture
${modID}:Rupture.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you lose HP, gain !M! Strength.

${modID}:SacrificialLamp.NAME: Sacrificial Lamp
${modID}:SacrificialLamp.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust a card in your hand. NL Add a card from your discard or draw pile to your hand. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Armaments.NAME: Armaments
${modID}:Armaments.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! block. NL Upgrade a card in your hand for the rest of the combat.
${modID}:Armaments.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! block. NL Upgrade your hand for the rest of the combat.

${modID}:Clash.NAME: Clash
${modID}:Clash.DESCRIPTION: Can only be played if every card in your hand is an attack. NL Deal !D! damage.

${modID}:Feed.NAME: Feed
${modID}:Feed.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If fatal, raise your max HP by !M!. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:Juggernaut.NAME: Juggernaut
${modID}:Juggernaut.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you gain block, deal !M! damage to a random enemy.

${modID}:SearingBlow.NAME: Searing Blow
${modID}:SearingBlow.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL Can be upgraded any number of times.

${modID}:SecondWind.NAME: Second Wind
${modID}:SecondWind.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust all non-attack cards in your hand. NL Gain !B! block for each card exhausted.

${modID}:QuickPatch.NAME: Quick Patch
${modID}:QuickPatch.DESCRIPTION: Discard your hand, heal !M! for each card discarded. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:PainRemains.NAME: Pain Remains
${modID}:PainRemains.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you take !M! damage from your cards, gain 2 intangible.

${modID}:Counterfort.NAME: Counterfort
${modID}:Counterfort.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! block, deal damage equal to your block.

${modID}:CullTheWeak.NAME: Cull The Weak
${modID}:CullTheWeak.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage X times to the enemy with the lowest HP, if he is below 50% deal double damage.

${modID}:Evolve.NAME: Evolve
${modID}:Evolve.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you draw a Status card, draw a card.
${modID}:Evolve.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Whenever you draw a Status card, draw !M! cards.

${modID}:Thunderclap.NAME: Thunderclap
${modID}:Thunderclap.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to all enemies, apply 1 vulnerable.

${modID}:WeakWills.NAME: Weak Wills
${modID}:WeakWills.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to all enemies, apply !M! weak.

${modID}:ZeroThoughts.NAME: Zero Thoughts
${modID}:ZeroThoughts.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you play an attack card, gain !M! block.

${modID}:Branded.NAME: Branded
${modID}:Branded.DESCRIPTION: Whenever you draw a burn deal !M! damage to all enemies.

${modID}:CorruptingStrike.NAME: Corrupting Strike
${modID}:CorruptingStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, play a card in your hand for free, exhaust it and gain burns equal to its cost.
${modID}:CorruptingStrike.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, play a card in your hand for free, exhaust it and gain burns equal to its cost -1.

${modID}:FieryStrike.NAME: Fiery Strike
${modID}:FieryStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, add a burn to your draw pile.

${modID}:FlameBreath.NAME: Flame Breath
${modID}:FlameBreath.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to all enemies, add a burn to your discard pile.

${modID}:FueledByFire.NAME: Fueled By Fire
${modID}:FueledByFire.DESCRIPTION: Draw !M! cards, add a burn to your discard pile.

${modID}:Inferno.NAME: Inferno
${modID}:Inferno.DESCRIPTION: Exhaust all burns, deal !D! damage to a random enemy () times. NL Exhaust.
EXTENDED_DESCRIPTION: Exhaust all burns, deal !D! damage to a random enemy (

${modID}:MaledictionOfFlames.NAME: Malediction Of Flames
${modID}:MaledictionOfFlames.DESCRIPTION: Transform every and any future curse or status card into a burn.

${modID}:BlindStrike.NAME: Blind Strike
${modID}:BlindStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to a random enemy.

${modID}:DesperateStrike.NAME: Desperate Strike
${modID}:DesperateStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, gain block equal to your masochism.

${modID}:EnragedStrike.NAME: Enraged Strike
${modID}:EnragedStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage, gain damage equal to !M! times your masochism.

${modID}:FollowThrough.NAME: Follow Through
${modID}:FollowThrough.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage !M! times, sap on every instance.

${modID}:InfernalBlade.NAME: Infernal Blade
${modID}:InfernalBlade.DESCRIPTION: Add a random attack to your hand, it costs 0 this turn. Add 2 burns. NL Exhaust.
${modID}:InfernalBlade.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: Add a random attack to your hand, it costs 0 this combat. Add 2 burns. NL Exhaust.

${modID}:PerfectedStrike.NAME: Perfected Strike
${modID}:PerfectedStrike.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. Deal !M! additional damage for ALL your cards containing "Strike"

${modID}:PushThrough.NAME: Push Through
${modID}:PushThrough.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. If you have masochism, draw a card
